2026-04-27T09:55:46.6262531Z  | `npx dev-tool test-proxy reset`                  | Reverts the local changes to recordings and resets to what is currently checked in to the assets repo. This is a destructive operation.                                                                                                                                                                                              |

2026-04-27T09:55:46.6501795Z @@ -263,7 +263,8 @@ The `InteractiveBrowserCredential` follows the [implicit grant
2026-04-27T09:55:46.6502509Z  flow](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/active-directory/develop/v2-oauth2-implicit-grant-flow)
2026-04-27T09:55:46.6507007Z  which enables authentication for clients that run completely in the browser. It
2026-04-27T09:55:46.6507976Z  is primarily useful for single-page web applications (SPAs) which need to
2026-04-27T09:55:46.6508537Z -authenticate to access Azure resources and APIs directly.
2026-04-27T09:55:46.6509748Z +authenticate to access Azure resources and APIs directly. This credential also
2026-04-27T09:55:46.6510863Z +supports Node.js via the authorization code flow with PKCE.
2026-04-27T09:55:46.6513230Z  
2026-04-27T09:55:46.6513980Z  To use this credential successfully, your app registration will need to be
2026-04-27T09:55:46.6514597Z  configured with both the **Access tokens** and **ID tokens** options checked under
2026-04-27T09:55:46.6515973Z @@ -275,9 +276,6 @@ to the URI of your web application. You must also make sure to specify the same
2026-04-27T09:55:46.6516740Z  URI in the `redirectUri` field of the `InteractiveBrowserCredentialOptions` when
2026-04-27T09:55:46.6518280Z  creating an `InteractiveBrowserCredential`.
2026-04-27T09:55:46.6518891Z  
2026-04-27T09:55:46.6519569Z -> NOTE: At this time, this credential can only be used in the browser but
2026-04-27T09:55:46.6520285Z -> Node.js support will be added in the future (see issue [#4774](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/issues/4774)).
2026-04-27T09:55:46.6521144Z -
2026-04-27T09:55:46.6521423Z  ### DeviceCodeCredential
